_comment: PYR3-023 BE 4K parity gate per-fixture thresholds (vs kotlin v1.1 SHOWCASE_4K JPGs). Calibrated 2026-05-27 from one v0.17 run; variance is sub-0.01 R at 3B-sample-class quality. v0.19 (2026-05-28): added `tier` field for narrative consistency with the 19-fixture corpus (tier 2 if measured R ≥ 5.0). 4K thresholds use round(measured + 2.0) (JPG noise floor headroom). v0.20 corpus-expansion will harmonize field names (baselineR → expectedR) across both meta files.

248.22289.notes: engine-precision-drift, not regression — GPU f32 vs CPU f64 in variation kernels; see PYR3-029 Phase 5/6 closure.
